summary: For example; your character has Technician / Electronics

mechanics.name_guess: For example; your character has Technician / Electronics
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 025 > factions > For example; your character has Technician / Electronics
mechanics.excerpt: For example; your character has Technician / Electronics and Technician/Lasers he or she uses and advances each one separately: In the Life Path, some subskills are listed as affiliation: These skills are related to the character' chosen affiliation (see 26). For example. character from the Capellan Confederation who gains the Academic /Affiliation History Skill actually has the Academic /Capellan Confederation History Skill.
